examples: The research areas cover diabetes, obesity, growth hormone deficiency and haemophilia.
Blood products, such as those used by people with haemophilia, are now heat-treated to make them safe.
Some hospitals, like Great Ormond Street, already use them to help detect male babies that could have haemophilia.
Michael Connarty (Falkirk East, Labour) asked for ex-gratia payments to the families of haemophilia sufferers.
The Scottish Haemophilia Forum (SHF) has been pushing for a public inquiry into how the patients contracted Hepatitis C.
